title: Details & Curiosities
subtitle: A few practical answers to help you plan your getaway.

list.a: Welcome Party: 'Desert Casual' (light linens, relaxed tailoring, comfortable footwear). Wedding Day: 'Desert Formal' (suits in lighter or neutral tones, elegant midi or maxi length dresses). Keep in mind the desert temperature cools down after sunset, so we recommend bringing a light layer.
While we love your families, our wedding weekend events are adults-only.
